ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "txn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "txn_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash */,
  "unix_timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the transaction */,
  "date_time_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction in UTC */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Bought, Sold, Transferred) */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID of the NFT */,
  "nft_type" TEXT /* Type of the NFT */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the NFT */,
  "price_eth" REAL /* Price of the NFT in ETH */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the NFT in USD */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Successful, Failed, Pending) */,
  "transaction_fee_eth" REAL /* Transaction fee in ETH */,
  "transaction_fee_usd" REAL /* Transaction fee in USD */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., ETH, Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "royalty_fee_eth" REAL /* Royalty fee in ETH */,
  "royalty_fee_usd" REAL /* Royalty fee in USD */,
  "smart_contract_address" TEXT /* Smart contract address for the transaction */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network where the transaction occurred (e.g., Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_nft_id FOREIGN KEY ("nft_id") REFERENCES nfts ("nft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user based on transaction history */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Buyer, Seller) */,
  "wallet_balance_eth" REAL /* User's current wallet balance in ETH */,
  "wallet_balance_usd" REAL /* User's current wallet balance in USD */,
  "transaction_volume_eth" REAL /* Total transaction volume in ETH */,
  "transaction_volume_usd" REAL /* Total transaction volume in USD */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user (e.g., Unverified, Verified, Suspended) */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* User's referral code */,
  "referral_count" INTEGER /* Number of users referred by this user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nfts" (
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NFT */,
  "nft_name" TEXT /* Name of the NFT */,
  "nft_description" TEXT /* Description of the NFT */,
  "nft_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the NFT image */,
  "nft_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT collection */,
  "nft_type" TEXT /* Type of the NFT */,
  "nft_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the NFT */,
  "nft_traits" TEXT /* Traits of the NFT (stored as JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the NFT was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the NFT was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator of the NFT */,
  "royalty_percentage" REAL /* Royalty percentage that the creator receives from secondary sales */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license associated with the NFT (e.g., Commercial, Non-Commercial) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Current owner of the NFT */,
  "mint_date" TEXT /* Date and time the NFT was minted */,
  "current_bid" REAL /* Current highest bid for the NFT */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Status of any ongoing auction (e.g., Active, Ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nfts_nft_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("nft_collection_id") REFERENCES nft_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nfts_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nfts_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nft_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NFT collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the NFT collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the NFT collection */,
  "collection_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the collection image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collection was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator of the NFT collection */,
  "total_nfts" INTEGER /* Total number of NFTs in the collection */,
  "total_volume_traded_eth" REAL /* Total volume traded in ETH for the collection */,
  "total_volume_traded_usd" REAL /* Total volume traded in USD for the collection */,
  "average_price_eth" REAL /* Average price of NFTs in the collection in ETH */,
  "average_price_usd" REAL /* Average price of NFTs in the collection in USD */,
  "rarity_score" REAL /* Rarity score of the collection */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license associated with the collection (e.g., Commercial, Non-Commercial) */,
  "collection_status" TEXT /* Status of the collection (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nft_collections_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplaces" (
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace */,
  "marketplace_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketplace */,
  "marketplace_url" TEXT /* URL to the marketplace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the marketplace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the marketplace was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the marketplace */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the marketplace */,
  "transaction_fee_percentage" REAL /* Transaction fee percentage charged by the marketplace */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* List of supported currencies (e.g., ETH, USD) */,
  "supported_blockchains" TEXT /* List of supported blockchains (e.g., Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain) */,
  "marketplace_status" TEXT /* Status of the marketplace (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "txn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Started, Completed, Failed) */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., Backend, Frontend) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log entry */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_txn_id FOREIGN KEY ("txn_id") REFERENCES transactions ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "txn_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NFT */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace */,
  "date_time_utc" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction in UTC */,
  "price_eth" REAL /* Price of the NFT in ETH */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the NFT in USD */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the NFT */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Bought, Sold, Transferred) */,
  "nft_type" TEXT /* Type of the NFT */,
  "nft_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the NFT */,
  "nft_traits" TEXT /* Traits of the NFT (stored as JSON) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Buyer, Seller) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee_eth" REAL /* Transaction fee in ETH */,
  "transaction_fee_usd" REAL /* Transaction fee in USD */,
  "royalty_fee_eth" REAL /* Royalty fee in ETH */,
  "royalty_fee_usd" REAL /* Royalty fee in USD */,
  "smart_contract_address" TEXT /* Smart contract address for the transaction */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network where the transaction occurred */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Status of any ongoing auction (e.g., Active, Ended) */,
  "current_bid" REAL /* Current highest bid for the NFT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_txn_id FOREIGN KEY ("txn_id") REFERENCES transactions ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_nft_id FOREIGN KEY ("nft_id") REFERENCES nfts ("nft_id")
)
